title: Amtech E2300 300mm (12") Cigar Sharpening Stone
features: 120 GRIT: This 300mm (12") aluminium oxide cigar sharpening stone has a coarse 120 grit surface
VERSATILE: It ideal for sharpening all types of garden tools such as hand shears, bill hooks, lawnmower blades, etc
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Sharpening Cigar Stone See more
